docket_entries.description: ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; TO FORM INTERROGATORIES; TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS
AMENDED PETN FOR FORFEITURE IN REM

DISCOVERY 612, PRESENT: PAMELA UNDERWOOD, ESQ. FOR PETITIONER/MOVING PARTY, THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA. NO OTHER APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PETITIONER'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES, FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. CLAIMANTS ARE ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES (NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FOR INTERROGATORIES; PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS); MEMO OF P&A; DECLARATION; PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF (FOREFEITURE) HEARING SET FOR FEB-10-2005 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 612
